label: Wide 2BR — no hall. Great room across the front (with standard tucked front-right), master/common/kitchen across the rear, single T&B opening into the great room.

adjacencies.note: bedroom door: 0.8-0.9 m + frame, so 0.9 m shared wall (horizontal: great's north edge meets master's south edge)
bedroom door: 0.8-0.9 m + frame, so 0.9 m shared wall (vertical: great's east edge meets standard's west edge)
bathroom door: 700 mm clear + 75 mm frames = 850 mm shared wall (horizontal: great's north edge meets common's south edge in the rear-center)
kitchen flows directly into the great room (could be horizontal or vertical depending on geometry — solver picks)
common bath and kitchen share a plumbing wall (vertical: common's east edge meets kitchen's west edge)

notes: Compact 5-room wide 2BR with NO hallway. The great room is the public/
circulation spine on its own — every room opens directly onto it.
REAR BAND (left to right):
master (flush left, rear-anchored)
common T&B (rear-center, sandwiched between master and kitchen)
kitchen (flush right, rear-anchored)
FRONT BAND:
great room (left + center, full front, runs from front to the rear
band's south edge so it can host doors into master,
common, and kitchen)
standard bedroom (flush right, tucked under the kitchen)
Access flows:
Front door -> great room (entry)
Great room -> master (bedroom door, horizontal wall at the rear-left)
Great room -> standard (bedroom door, vertical wall on great's east edge)
Great room -> common T&B (bath door, horizontal wall in rear-center)
Great room -> kitchen (open plan, horizontal or vertical)
Common <-> kitchen (wet-core plumbing wall at the rear)
Lot intent: wide shell. Profiles tune room min-areas for moderate (16x10,
~6 m buildable depth) and ample (16x11+, ~7 m depth).
